# CyberSathi

> Cyber crime awareness and alerts for India. Blogs, world news, and curated videos on phishing, UPI fraud, ransomware, identity theft, and online scams — so you can stay one step ahead of scammers.

## Site

- Homepage: https://www.cybersathi.in
- Blog: https://www.cybersathi.in/blog
- News: https://www.cybersathi.in/news
- Videos: https://www.cybersathi.in/videos
- About: https://www.cybersathi.in/about

## Content

CyberSathi publishes:
- Long-form guides on cyber-crime patterns in India (phishing, UPI fraud, ransomware, SIM swap, identity theft, crypto scams)
- Short summaries of cyber-crime news from India and globally, with links to original sources
- Curated YouTube videos on cybersecurity topics with AI-generated summaries

## Categories

- Phishing: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/phishing
- Ransomware: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/ransomware
- UPI Fraud: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/upi-fraud
- Identity Theft: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/identity-theft
- Data Breaches: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/data-breaches
- Dark Web: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/dark-web
- Social Engineering: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/social-engineering
- Malware: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/malware
- Cryptocurrency Fraud: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/cryptocurrency
- Investment Fraud: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/investment-fraud
- Children Safety: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/children-safety
- Cyber Law: https://www.cybersathi.in/category/cyber-law

## Audience

Indian internet users, SMBs, parents, and professionals seeking plain-language cybersecurity awareness content. Primary language: English. India-focused coverage.

## Contact

- Contact: https://www.cybersathi.in/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://www.cybersathi.in/privacy
- Terms: https://www.cybersathi.in/terms
